controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-1 Digital Day/Night Remote Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-1 Digital Day/Night Remote Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mitsubishi, LG, Samsung, Fujitsu, Pioneer mini-splits
compatible_devices.notes: Standalone single-task controller; not integrated with TM+ Pro or other TrolMaster systems. Uses IR teach-and-learn from original AC remote. Automates day/night temperature setpoints via photocell. NOT compatible with: Daikin, Mr. Cool, Innovair, Cooper, Hunter. Cannot access all AC modes (e.g., fan-only, dehumidify mode). Input 120V AC.
